options.name: -created
options.description: Reports the statistics including reduction ratio of the models that have been created.

options.name: -identified
options.description: Reports the statistics of the modules/instgroups that have been identified as models.

options.name: -instance_ratio
options.description: Specifies ratio value where report_proto__model only reports flexModels that have instance ratio greater than or equal to this specified value.

options.name: -min_inst
options.description: Specifies the threshold of an instance count that is used to filter modules.
